com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration

Class AuthorizeCard.AuthorizeResponse

    • com.pax.poslink.base.BaseResponse<ManageResponse>
      • com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.AuthorizeCard.AuthorizeResponse
  • Enclosing class:
    AuthorizeCard

    public static class AuthorizeCard.AuthorizeResponse
extends BaseResponse<ManageResponse>
    The response data of Authorize.

    • Constructor Detail

      • AuthorizeResponse

        public AuthorizeResponse()

    • Method Detail

      • getAuthorizationResult

        public java.lang.String getAuthorizationResult()
        Indicate the transaction result after 1st GAC.
        0: transaction offline approved
        1: transaction offline declined
        2: transaction online authorization needed
        Returns:
        0: transaction offline approved; 1: transaction offline declined; 2: transaction online authorization needed

      • getSignatureFlag

        public java.lang.String getSignatureFlag()
        Indicate that if signature is needed.
        Returns:
        0: Signature NOT needed; 1: Signature needed

      • getPinBypassStatus

        public java.lang.String getPinBypassStatus()
        Returns:
        0: False 1: True

      • getPinBlock

        public java.lang.String getPinBlock()
        Returns:
        The PIN BLOCK.

      • getKSN

        public java.lang.String getKSN()
        Returns:
        The KSN.

      • getEmvData

        public java.lang.String getEmvData()
        EMV TLV data.

        If contact EMV card is read successfully, some related EMV data will be returned in consecutive TLV format data.
        Format: tag + data
        Note: All the EMV TLV data shall be expanded to double length.
        Example:
        AID (A0 00 00 00 04 10 10)"\x4F\x07\xA0\x00\x00\x00\x04\x10\x10" -> "4F07A0000000041010"
        Cardholder Name ("JACK")"\x5F\x20\x04\x4A\x41\x43\x4B" -> "5F20044A41434B"

        See EMV Tags for Response of Authorize Card for definition.

        Returns:
        EMV TLV data.

      • getCvm

        public java.lang.String getCvm()
        Cardholder Verification Method (CVM) Codes,

        0 - Fail CVM processing
        1 - Plaintext Offline PIN Verification
        2 - Online PIN
        3 - Plaintext Offline PIN and Signature
        4 - Enciphered Offline PIN Verification
        5 - Enciphered Offline PIN Verification and Signature
        6 - Signature
        7 - No CVM Required
        8 - On Device CVM

        Returns:
        CVM
        Since:
        V1.03.01

      • getPinpadType

        public java.lang.String getPinpadType()
        Pinpad Type:

        Returns:
        0: Internal Pinpad
        1: External Pinpad
        Since:
        V1.08.00

      • unpack

        protected void unpack(ManageResponse srcResponse)
        Specified by:
        unpack in class BaseResponse<ManageResponse>
